scope.adminScope: admin retains existing global packet list behavior
scope.nonAdminScope: server requires packet.userId to match the session user, packet.organizationId to match the session organization, and processingStatus=completed
scope.pagination: bounded default and max limits from list_GET.schema.ts

requiredCommands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/api tests/unit --runInBand
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api tests/unit

commandResults.command: pnpm exec vitest run tests/api tests/unit --runInBand
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api tests/unit
